title: narrative_intent.json — the parameterized emotional blueprint (the emotional score)
description: v1.0. The machine-actionable bridge between Iris's poetic creative_treatment and every downstream agent. The treatment says a scene should feel 'awe-inspiring'; the script/audio engines only read structural keywords, so the EMOTIONAL objective evaporated at each handoff. This artifact translates the poetry into a closed-vocabulary emotional score that travels with the project: a video-level thesis + journey + tone, a five-phase emotional arc, and per-scene emotional directives (emotion + intensity + pacing + texture + a human delivery note). Produced AFTER the creative_treatment and BEFORE the script, on the strong creative model. The closed vocabularies (emotions, pacing directives, texture directives, arc phases, tone profile) are enumerated here so consumers can map a value deterministically. Every field beyond schema_version is OPTIONAL and additionalProperties:true throughout, so the pipeline stays backward-compatible when the stage is absent and nothing breaks if a producer adds a field.

emotion.description: the closed emotion vocabulary the whole pipeline shares

pacing_directive.description: how the narration should be paced/voiced for this scene

texture_directive.description: the visual + sonic surface texture this scene wears

arc_phase.description: which of the five emotional-arc phases this scene belongs to

duration_goal_sec.description: roughly how many seconds this phase should occupy

core_thesis.description: the single sentence argument this video exists to make

emotional_journey.description: what the viewer should feel at the start vs. the end — be specific

tone_profile.description: the overall narrative tone, one of the closed set

emotional_arc.description: the five-phase emotional spine of the video, each a dominant emotion + intensity + duration goal

per_scene_intent.description: one emotional directive per anticipated scene, in order (scene_index is 0-based and contiguous)

delivery_note.description: a concrete, human, actionable delivery instruction for this scene
